since_last: 56% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +5.19%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 56% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.25% · BTC +0.66% · Gold +1.69% · Nasdaq100 -0.42%. 56% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +5.19%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +5.19%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.00%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: DV is the standout at +8.59%
cards.body: Leaders: DV +8.59%, PUBM +8.34%, NOW +8.17%, MGNI +7.71%, RXRX +7.34%. Laggards: TER -7.63%, HPE -7.31%, VRT -6.74%, LRCX -5.45%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.79% at $155.74
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.79% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
